# Hawaii Trip Packing List

Based on your vacation itinerary from June 10-20, 2024, here's your packing list:

## Essentials
- Travel documents (passport, ID, flight tickets, hotel reservations)
- Camera

## Clothing & Swimwear
- Swimwear (for beach days at Waikiki, snorkeling at Hanauma Bay, and kayaking at Kailua Beach)
- Casual outfits (for daily activities and shopping at Ala Moana Center)
- Hiking gear (for Diamond Head hike)
- Comfortable walking shoes

## Activity-Specific Items
- Snorkeling gear (if you prefer to bring your own)
- Kayaking equipment (if not provided by tour)
- Beach towel

## Sun Protection
- Sunscreen (reef-safe recommended)
- Sunglasses
- Sun hat or cap
- After-sun lotion

## Other Recommended Items
- Light jacket or sweater (for cooler evenings)
- Rain poncho or light raincoat (Hawaii can have occasional showers)
- Reusable water bottle
- Snacks for day trips
- Beach bag
- Toiletries and medications
- Phone and charger
- Power bank
- Travel adapter (if needed)

Would you like me to add any additional items to this list or create a separate document with this packing list?
